# Corrective Action Form Template

## CAPA (Corrective and Preventive Action) Report

**CAPA Reference Number:** _______________ *(Auto-generated or sequential)*
**Date Raised:** _______________
**Raised by:** _______________

---

## Problem Description

**Source of Nonconformance:**
- ☐ Internal audit
- ☐ Customer complaint
- ☐ Supplier nonconformance
- ☐ Product test failure
- ☐ Process deviation
- ☐ Regulatory inspection
- ☐ Pest sighting
- ☐ Equipment failure
- ☐ Other: _______________

**Category:**
- ☐ Food Safety
- ☐ Quality
- ☐ Allergen
- ☐ GMP/Hygiene
- ☐ Traceability
- ☐ Documentation

**Severity:**
- ☐ Critical (immediate food safety risk)
- ☐ Major (significant risk or system failure)
- ☐ Minor (low risk or isolated incident)

**Description of Problem:**
_______________

**Location/Process Affected:** _______________

**Product/Batch Affected (if applicable):** _______________

**Evidence (attach photos, test results, etc.):** _______________

---

## Immediate Action (Containment)

**Action Taken to Control the Problem:**
_______________

**Date Completed:** _______________
**Completed by:** _______________

**Product Disposition:**
- ☐ Released (no safety concern)
- ☐ Rework
- ☐ Downgrade
- ☐ Quarantine
- ☐ Dispose/Destroy

---

## Root Cause Analysis

**Investigation Method:**
- ☐ 5 Whys
- ☐ Fishbone diagram
- ☐ Fault tree analysis
- ☐ Process review

**Root Cause Identified:**
_______________

**Contributing Factors:**
_______________

**Investigation Completed by:** _______________
**Date:** _______________

---

## Corrective Action Plan

**Corrective Action (to eliminate the root cause):**
_______________

**Responsible Person:** _______________
**Target Completion Date:** _______________
**Actual Completion Date:** _______________

**Resources Required:** _______________

**Status:**
- ☐ Open
- ☐ In Progress
- ☐ Completed
- ☐ Verified Effective

---

## Preventive Action (to prevent recurrence)

**Preventive Measures:**
- ☐ Update procedure/SOP
- ☐ Staff retraining
- ☐ Equipment modification/replacement
- ☐ Supplier change
- ☐ Enhanced monitoring
- ☐ HACCP plan update
- ☐ Other: _______________

**Details:** _______________

**Responsible Person:** _______________
**Target Completion Date:** _______________
**Actual Completion Date:** _______________

---

## Verification of Effectiveness

**Verification Method:**
- ☐ Follow-up audit
- ☐ Inspection
- ☐ Testing
- ☐ Record review
- ☐ Observation

**Verification Date:** _______________
**Verified by:** _______________

**Effectiveness Assessment:**
- ☐ Effective (problem has not recurred; controls are working)
- ☐ Ineffective (further action required)

**Comments:** _______________

---

## Closure

**CAPA Closed:** ☐ Yes ☐ No

**Closed by:** _______________
**Date:** _______________

**Sign-off (Manager/QA):** _______________
**Date:** _______________

---

**Record Retention:** 3 years minimum
